source_old_req: The TCAS system shall assume that the external input data provided through the following ports are physically valid: nearestIntruderAltitude must be strictly greater than 0.0, nearestIntruderGroundDistance must be strictly greater than 0, ownAltitude must be strictly greater than 0.0, ownHeading must be within the half-open interval [0, 360), ownLatitude must be within the closed interval [0, 90], and ownLongitude must be within the closed interval [-180, 180]. These assumptions define the baseline preconditions for all system-level logical computations performed by the TCAS component.
natural_requirement: The TCAS component shall define the implementation-level data routing and execution constraints for TCAS.impl. In the implementation layer, TCAS.impl shall route signal flow from nearestIntruderAltitude to surveillance.nearestIntruderAltitude_in through nia_from_external and signal flow from nearestIntruderGroundDistance to surveillance.nearestIntruderGroundDistance_in through nigd_from_external. Additionally, TCAS.impl shall use immediate communication timing on connection nia_from_external, use immediate communication timing on connection nigd_from_external, use immediate communication timing on connection nilo_from_external, and use immediate communication timing on connection oa_from_external.

requirement_items.text: The TCAS.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from nearestIntruderAltitude to surveillance.nearestIntruderAltitude_in through connection nia_from_external.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The TCAS.impl implementation shall declare connection nia_from_external from nearestIntruderAltitude to surveillance.nearestIntruderAltitude_in.

requirement_items.text: The TCAS.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from nearestIntruderGroundDistance to surveillance.nearestIntruderGroundDistance_in through connection nigd_from_external.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The TCAS.impl implementation shall declare connection nigd_from_external from nearestIntruderGroundDistance to surveillance.nearestIntruderGroundDistance_in.

requirement_items.text: The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection nia_from_external.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection nia_from_external as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection nigd_from_external.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection nigd_from_external as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection nilo_from_external.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection nilo_from_external as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection oa_from_external.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection oa_from_external as immediate.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The TCAS.impl implementation shall declare connection nia_from_external from nearestIntruderAltitude to surveillance.nearestIntruderAltitude_in. The TCAS.impl implementation shall declare connection nigd_from_external from nearestIntruderGroundDistance to surveillance.nearestIntruderGroundDistance_in. The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection nia_from_external as immediate. The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection nigd_from_external as immediate. The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection nilo_from_external as immediate. The TCAS.impl implementation shall assign timing on connection oa_from_external as immediate.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The TCAS.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from nearestIntruderAltitude to surveillance.nearestIntruderAltitude_in through connection nia_from_external. The TCAS.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from nearestIntruderGroundDistance to surveillance.nearestIntruderGroundDistance_in through connection nigd_from_external. The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection nia_from_external. The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection nigd_from_external. The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection nilo_from_external. The TCAS.impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection oa_from_external.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
